# @form-engine/headless

> Unstyled semantic HTML field components for @form-engine/core. All 19 field types using native HTML elements only -- no UI framework dependency. Data attributes for CSS targeting, ARIA for accessibility.

- Docs: [README](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/headless/README.md)
- Agent instructions: [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/headless/AGENTS.md)
- npm: [@form-engine/headless](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@form-engine/headless)
- License: MIT
- Peer dependencies: `react`, `react-dom`, `react-hook-form`, `@form-engine/core`

## API Surface

### Registry
- `createHeadlessFieldRegistry()` -- Creates the default headless field registry (`Record<string, React.JSX.Element>`) for use with `InjectedFieldProvider`

### Editable Field Components (13)
- `HookTextbox` -- `<input type="text">`
- `HookNumber` -- `<input type="number">`
- `HookToggle` -- `<input type="checkbox" role="switch">`
- `HookDropdown` -- `<select>` + `<option>`
- `HookMultiSelect` -- `<select multiple>`
- `HookDateControl` -- `<input type="date">` + clear button
- `HookSlider` -- `<input type="range">` + `<output>`
- `HookSimpleDropdown` -- `<select>` for string arrays
- `HookMultiSelectSearch` -- `<input type="search">` + checkbox list
- `HookTextarea` -- `<textarea>` + native `<dialog>` expand
- `HookDocumentLinks` -- URL list with add/remove
- `HookStatusDropdown` -- `<select>` with status color indicator
- `HookDynamicFragment` -- `<input type="hidden">`

### Read-Only Field Components (6)
- `HookReadOnly` -- `<span>`
- `HookReadOnlyArray` -- `<ul>` / `<li>`
- `HookReadOnlyDateTime` -- `<time>`
- `HookReadOnlyCumulativeNumber` -- `<span>`
- `HookReadOnlyRichText` -- `<div dangerouslySetInnerHTML>`
- `HookReadOnlyWithButton` -- `<span>` + `<button>`

### Supporting Components
- `ReadOnlyText` -- Shared read-only text display
- `StatusMessage` -- Form status display
- `HookFormLoading` -- Skeleton loading state

### Helpers
- `GetFieldDataTestId()` -- Build data-testid attribute
- `getFieldState()` -- Compute data-field-state value from error/required/readOnly
- `formatDateTime()` -- Format date string for display
- `DocumentLinksStrings` -- Default string literals for document links UI

### Data Attributes
- `data-field-type` -- Field type key (e.g., "Textbox", "Dropdown")
- `data-field-state` -- Field state ("error", "required", "readonly", "disabled")

### CSS Custom Properties (in styles.css)
- `--df-font-family`, `--df-font-size`
- `--df-color-primary`, `--df-color-error`, `--df-color-border`, `--df-color-border-focus`
- `--df-border-radius`, `--df-spacing-sm`, `--df-spacing-md`

## Code Example

```tsx
import { RulesEngineProvider, InjectedFieldProvider, FormEngine } from "@form-engine/core";
import { createHeadlessFieldRegistry } from "@form-engine/headless";
import "@form-engine/headless/styles.css";

const formConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: {
    name: { type: "Textbox", label: "Name", required: true },
    role: { type: "Dropdown", label: "Role", options: [
      { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
      { value: "user", label: "User" },
    ]},
  },
  fieldOrder: ["name", "role"],
};

function App() {
  return (
    <RulesEngineProvider>
      <InjectedFieldProvider injectedFields={createHeadlessFieldRegistry()}>
        <FormEngine formConfig={formConfig} saveData={async (data) => data} />
      </InjectedFieldProvider>
    </RulesEngineProvider>
  );
}
```
